Foreign client bill payments
Users abroad ask an agent in Canada to pay a bill (tuition, subscription, service). The agent pays, the user reimburses the amount + commission.

Interac Email Details

From: {{selectedInteracEmail.senderName}} <{{selectedInteracEmail.from}}>

Subject: {{selectedInteracEmail.subject}}

Date: {{selectedInteracEmail.date | date:'medium'}}

Amount: {{selectedInteracEmail.amount || 'N/A'}}

Status: {{selectedInteracEmail.status | uppercase}}

{{selectedInteracEmail.body}}

Confirm Interac Credit

The following operation will be performed:

  • Sender: {{selectedInteracEmail?.from}}
  • Subject: {{selectedInteracEmail?.subject}}
  • Extracted amount: {{pendingInteracCredit.amountStr}}
  • Wallet: {{pendingInteracCredit.wallet.usersEmail}} (interac: {{pendingInteracCredit.wallet.interacEmail}})
  • Currency: {{pendingInteracCredit.wallet.currency}}
  • Current balance: {{pendingInteracCredit.wallet.amount}}
  • New balance after credit: {{pendingInteracCredit.newBalance}}

Reverse Interac Credit

The email is currently processed. Moving it to {{pendingInteracReversal.targetStatus | uppercase}} will debit the previously credited amount from the wallet.

  • Sender: {{selectedInteracEmail?.from}}
  • Subject: {{selectedInteracEmail?.subject}}
  • Extracted amount: {{pendingInteracReversal.amountStr}}
  • Wallet: {{pendingInteracReversal.wallet.usersEmail}} (interac: {{pendingInteracReversal.wallet.interacEmail}})
  • Currency: {{pendingInteracReversal.wallet.currency}}
  • Current balance: {{pendingInteracReversal.wallet.amount}}
  • New balance after debit: {{pendingInteracReversal.newBalance}}
Warning: this will leave the wallet with a negative balance.

Confirm MoMo Credit

The following operation will be performed:

  • Operator: {{selectedMomoDeposit?.operator}}
  • Transaction ID: {{selectedMomoDeposit?.transactionId}}
  • Declared amount: {{pendingMomoCredit.amount | number}} {{pendingMomoCredit.wallet.currency || 'XAF'}}
  • Wallet: {{pendingMomoCredit.wallet.usersEmail}} (code: {{pendingMomoCredit.wallet.momoCode}})
  • Sender phone: {{selectedMomoDeposit?.senderPhone || '—'}}
  • Current balance: {{pendingMomoCredit.wallet.amount | number}}
  • New balance after credit: {{pendingMomoCredit.newBalance | number}}
  • Customer note: {{selectedMomoDeposit?.note}}

Make sure you have verified the transaction in your MTN/Orange MoMo statement before approving.

Reject MoMo Deposit

Warning: this deposit was previously approved. Rejecting it will debit {{selectedMomoDeposit.amount | number}} {{selectedMomoDeposit.currency || 'XAF'}} from the wallet to reverse the credit.

  • Operator: {{selectedMomoDeposit.operator}}
  • Transaction ID: {{selectedMomoDeposit.transactionId}}
  • Amount: {{selectedMomoDeposit.amount | number}} {{selectedMomoDeposit.currency || 'XAF'}}
  • Wallet: {{selectedMomoDeposit.walletEmail}}
